AnalysisG

Modules Documentation

This section documents the existing C++ modules and their integration with the framework.

Overview

The modules documented here are the C++ implementations that form the backbone of AnalysisG. These are located in docs/modules/ and provide detailed information about:

  • C++ class structures

  • Inheritance hierarchies

  • Member functions

  • Implementation details

Doxygen Documentation

For detailed C++ API documentation, see the Doxygen-generated documentation available at:

  • /doxygen/html/index

The Doxygen documentation includes:

  • Class hierarchies

  • Member function signatures

  • Inheritance diagrams

  • Source code references

Module Categories

Core Modules

The core C++ modules that implement the fundamental framework functionality.

Analysis Modules

Modules for specialized analysis tasks and algorithms.

Data Structures

Container classes and data structure implementations.

I/O Modules

Input/output handling for ROOT files and other formats.

See Also

  • Core Module - Python API for core modules

  • Modules API - Python API for specialized modules
